name: NSTK Order Tracking
query:
SELECT
    PC.name AS "PO NUMBER:Link/Purchase Order:120",
    PC.set_warehouse AS "WAREHOUSE",
    PC.owner AS "Created By",
    PCT.item_code AS "ITEM:Link/Item:120",
    PCT.description AS "DESCRIPTION",
    (
        SELECT WD.type
        FROM `tabItem` AS IET
        INNER JOIN `tabWarehouse Details` AS WD ON IET.name = WD.parent
        WHERE IET.item_code = PCT.item_code
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS "TYPE",
    (
        SELECT IET.item_group
        FROM `tabItem` AS IET
        WHERE IET.item_code = PCT.item_code
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS "ITEM GROUP",
    (
        SELECT IET.sales_person_master
        FROM `tabItem` AS IET
        WHERE IET.item_code = PCT.item_code
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS "SALES PERSON MASTER:Link/Customer Master:120",
    (
        SELECT IET.customer_master
        FROM `tabItem` AS IET
        WHERE IET.item_code = PCT.item_code
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS "CUSTOMER MASTER:Link/Sales Person Master:120",
    PCT.qty AS "QTY",
    PCT.price_list_rate AS "NET UNIT",
    PCT.amount AS "AMOUNT",
    (
        SELECT SUM(SOI.qty)
        FROM `tabSales Order` AS SO
        INNER JOIN `tabSales Order Item` AS SOI ON SOI.parent = SO.name
        WHERE SOI.item_code = PCT.item_code
            AND SO.docstatus = 1
            AND (DATE(SO.transaction_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)
            AND SO.company = %(company)s
            AND SO.set_warehouse = %(warehouse)s
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS "SALES ORDER QTY"
FROM
    `tabPurchase Order` AS PC
INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` AS PCT ON PC.name = PCT.parent
WHERE
    PC.docstatus = 1
    AND (DATE(PC.transaction_date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s)
    AND PC.company = %(company)s
    AND PC.set_warehouse = %(warehouse)s
ORDER BY
    PC.name;
